excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Music lists 2nd round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-02-28. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st Round: 5 December 2025 2nd Round: 28 February 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly recommended.
